steps.action: Run eval.py compare --variant-a a8ra_v1 --variant-b luxalgo_v1 --config configs/locked_baseline.yaml --data data/eurusd_1m_2024-01-07_to_2024-01-12.csv --output results/val_test_eval
steps.expected: Command completes successfully with exit code 0
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Two cascades ran: variant_a=a8ra_v1 (mss: 243 detections) and variant_b=luxalgo_v1 (mss: 484 detections). Output written to results/val_test_eval/evaluation_run.json

steps.expected: Clear error with available variants listed
steps.observed: Exit code 1. RegistryError: 'No detector registered for primitive=mss, variant=nonexistent_v99. Available: [asia_range/a8ra_v1, displacement/a8ra_v1, ..., mss/a8ra_v1, mss/luxalgo_v1, order_block/a8ra_v1, order_block/luxalgo_v1, ...]' — 14 registered detectors listed

evidence.consoleErrors: none (successful run); RegistryError with available list (error case)
evidence.terminalOutput: Successful: exit 0, 'Comparison complete. Output: results/val_test_eval/evaluation_run.json'. Error: exit 1, 'RegistryError: No detector registered for primitive=mss, variant=nonexistent_v99. Available: [asia_range/a8ra_v1, displacement/a8ra_v1, equal_hl/a8ra_v1, fvg/a8ra_v1, htf_liquidity/a8ra_v1, liquidity_sweep/a8ra_v1, mss/a8ra_v1, mss/luxalgo_v1, order_block/a8ra_v1, order_block/luxalgo_v1, ote/a8ra_v1, reference_levels/a8ra_v1, session_liquidity/a8ra_v1, swing_points/a8ra_v1]'

assertions.title: Comparison output includes variant in JSON

steps.action: Parse evaluation_run.json and check per_config keys
steps.observed: per_config keys: 'locked_a8ra_v1', 'locked_luxalgo_v1' — variant name incorporated in config key

steps.action: Check variant field in config entries
Check pairwise comparison includes variant names
steps.expected: Pairwise entry has variant_a and variant_b fields

steps.action: Check per_primitive DetectionResult objects have variant field via per_config structure
steps.expected: Schema 4B entries have correct variant field
steps.observed: Both config entries contain variant field, per_primitive stats nested under variant-specific config entries

steps.action: Extract pairwise comparison stats for mss primitive
steps.observed: mss/1m: agreement_rate=0.3768, only_in_a=26, only_in_b=227 (count_a=179, count_b=388). mss/5m: agreement_rate=0.2667, only_in_a=20, only_in_b=46. mss/15m: agreement_rate=0.2286, only_in_a=12, only_in_b=15. Luxalgo fires significantly more MSS detections across all timeframes.

order_block/1m: agreement_rate=0.0328, only_in_a=122, only_in_b=350. order_block/5m: agreement_rate=0.0737, only_in_a=30, only_in_b=58. order_block/15m: agreement_rate=0.0256, only_in_a=16, only_in_b=22.

steps.expected: Non-variant primitives (displacement, fvg, etc.) have agreement_rate=1.0
steps.observed: displacement, fvg, swing_points, asia_range, reference_levels, session_liquidity, htf_liquidity, liquidity_sweep all have agreement_rate=1.0 — confirming only variant-specific primitives diverge

evidence.terminalOutput: mss totals: only_in_a=58, only_in_b=288, avg_agreement=0.2907. order_block totals: only_in_a=168, only_in_b=430, avg_agreement=0.0440. All non-variant primitives: agreement_rate=1.0.

steps.action: Count divergence_index entries only in one variant
steps.observed: Total divergence_index entries: 10495 (includes agreed). Entries only in one variant: 1187. Sum of only_in_a (469) + only_in_b (718) = 1187. Match confirmed.

steps.action: Check divergence entries are sorted by time
steps.observed: Entries are sorted by time within each primitive/tf group (confirmed). Global ordering follows primitive/tf grouping then chronological within each group.

steps.expected: Entries show detection_id_a/detection_id_b and in_a/in_b flags
steps.observed: Sample: {time=2024-01-07T19:30:00, primitive=mss, tf=15m, in_a=false, in_b=true} — luxalgo-only detection. {time=2024-01-08T00:45:00, primitive=mss, tf=15m, in_a=true, in_b=false} — a8ra-only detection. Each entry has detection_id_a, detection_id_b, in_a, in_b fields.

evidence.terminalOutput: divergence_index: 10495 entries, 1187 divergent (=469+718). Sorted within prim/tf groups. Sample: time=2024-01-07T19:30:00 prim=mss tf=15m in_a=False in_b=True; time=2024-01-08T00:45:00 prim=mss tf=15m in_a=True in_b=False; time=2024-01-08T04:15:00 prim=mss tf=15m in_a=False in_b=True

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. eval.py compare with --variant-a/--variant-b flags works correctly. Successful run produces JSON with variant fields in per_config entries and pairwise comparisons. Invalid variant produces clear RegistryError with available variants listed. Pairwise stats show luxalgo fires significantly more (mss: 484 vs 243, avg agreement 29%). Divergence index length matches only_in_a+only_in_b exactly (1187 entries).
